TextENGNew: ...I only recently learned that a rifle isn't a toy that should be handled by children.
My parents were talking about an international shooting competition while watching the news on TV, and I casually asked.
``...Hey, are rifles that dangerous?@k@vS20/00/VTT_aoi3002. Does that mean I'm not supposed to use them?``
...Of course, my parents laughed and said I was still too young for that.
But... I really wanted to shoot a rifle.

I understood that it was dangerous, and it was something that shouldn't be in the hands of children. But I thought that if I could handle it well in front of adults, it would prove to them that I'm more amazing than the other kids...
Then, a few days later.
I went out with my father on one of his hunting trips, and I insisted that he let me hold the rifle and teach me how to shoot.
Then, I carefully listened to what my father told me, tried it out... and I was able to shoot game prey right from the onset.

``That's amazing, Aoi!@k@vS20/00/VTT_hatakeH3002. I've never seen a child handle a rifle so well at your age.@k@vS20/00/VTT_hatakeH3003. You could be an Olympic athlete in the future, no doubt about it~!!``
``Eehehe~.♪``
Though I answered with a smile and a laugh... I was thinking about something else.
Just as I thought... I'm different from the other kids.
I've always wondered why playing ball or playing with dolls was supposed to be fun... but this is proof that I'm special. It's proof that I'm more like an adult.
So, there's nothing those damn kids can make fun of me about...!
``...Teehehehe.@k@vS20/00/VTT_aoi3005. Ahahahahahaha...``
To tell the truth... I've always been infuriated.
At the boys who thoughtlessly badmouthed me over Hinamizawa.
And at the girls watching who made no effort to stop it, who just laughed with a ``serves you right`` grin on their faces.
...When they notice a moment of weakness, they rush right in.
The worst kind of people, the ones who aren't satisfied unless they use others as stepping stones to achieve greatness.
I guess they find me an easy target, what with how I stick out like a sore thumb in class and can't compete against the others in grades.
And, even after having a consultation with the teacher about it, my parents just gave me a shallow warning and didn't do anything about it.
So... I made up my mind.
Nobody is going to help me.
Nobody is going to lend a hand... If anything, they'll only get in the way.
In that case... I'll do it myself.
I'm sure I can do it... Besides, unlike them, I have a powerful weapon at my disposal.
I won't let them make a fool of me any longer.
The people who don't understand my greatness can all just disappear...!!
I opened the closet and took the rifle out from the back.@k Then I got the bullets out of the safe, using the key I took from my parents' room.
...Somehow, it felt lighter than before.
Well, let's do this.
Shooting a person with their feet on the ground should be easier than shooting a bird in flight.
And then, I'll be able to grab ahold of my happiness.
With my own hands...
``...Oh, Aoi?@k@vS20/00/VTT_hatakeW3002. Wh-what are you doing?!``
...Mom.
You're standing in my way too?
Do you hate me...?!
